title: SW-LB Media (1L)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"atvue","text":"This protocol will make one liter of salt water LB.  Adjust volumes as necessary.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add stir bar and set to mix
10 g, Bacto Tryptone 5 g, Yeast Extract 24 g, NaCl 10.5 g, MgSO4•7H2O 0.11 g, NaHCO3
Allow to mix again with stir bar.
Add agar to container to be autclaved 15 g, agar Then add media.
creator: Brian A Smith
